parameters.query: INSERT INTO gda_opportunity_tracker (solicitation_number, opp_title, agency, dept, naics_code, set_aside, govtribe_id, source_url, response_deadline, estimated_value, place_of_performance, data_source, gda_score, gda_label, eis_fit_score, stage, last_refreshed) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9::timestamptz, $10::numeric, $11, $12, $13::int, $14, $15::int, $16, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (solicitation_number) DO UPDATE SET opp_title = EXCLUDED.opp_title, agency = EXCLUDED.agency, gda_score = EXCLUDED.gda_score, gda_label = EXCLUDED.gda_label, last_refreshed = NOW() RETURNING solicitation_number, gda_score, gda_label

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, upserted: $input.all().length, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
